items.raw_desc: Cumisüveg NUK Perfect Match Sheep 150 ml:The 150ml NUK Perfect Match Sheep baby bottle is designed for babies from birth and is designed with an emphasis on natural feeding. It is fitted with a soft silicone teat in size S, which is suitable for breast milk, water and tea and its thin, very flexible material faithfully imitates the suction from the mother's breast. The teat has a wide and soft lip support and promotes instinctive latching on the right place. NUK's anticoagulant system reduces the amount of air swallowed during feeding and helps prevent bloating and gas. The practical indicator allows you to quickly and clearly check the correct temperature of the contents. If the contents are too hot, they will change colour. The bottle is BPA-free and made of high quality material that is lightweight, durable and suitable for everyday long-term use.
